nasb.text: “In that day,” declares the Lord, “I will assemble the lame And gather the outcasts, Even those whom I have afflicted.

esv.text: In that day, declares the Lord, I will assemble the lame and gather those who have been driven away and those whom I have afflicted;

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“到那日， 我必召聚瘸腿的， 集合被趕散的， 和我所苦待的。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “到那日，我要聚集瘸腿的， 招聚被掳的和被我惩罚的。
